fields.explainZh: 存储池/虚拟磁盘的总空间大小。

fields.explainEn: Index of the board where the FC port resides.

fields.explainZh: FC主机端口配置速率，单位：1000Mbps,当前速率取值范围为：1，2，4，8，16G，进制单位为1000，0表示自协商，-1表示无效。
fields.explainEn: Configured rate of the FC host port, in 1000 Mbps. The value 0 indicates autonegotiation. The value -1 indicates invalid rate.
Logic type of the FC port.
Port mode of the FC port.

fields.explainZh: FC主机端口运行速率，单位：1000Mbps，值为-1时表示无效。
fields.explainEn: Operating rate of the FC port, in 1000 Mbps. The value -1 means invalid.

fields.explainZh: 告警转发地址的索引，取值为：0~3。
fields.explainEn: Index of the trap forwarding address, in the range of 0 to 3.

fields.explainZh: 告警转发的IP地址，只支持IPv4格式地址。
fields.explainEn: Trap forwarding address, which can only be an IPv4 address.

fields.explainZh: 告警转发地址的端口号，取值为：1~65535。
fields.explainEn: Port number of the trap forwarding address, in the range of 1 to 65535.
Version number of the trap forwarding address.

fields.explainZh: 告警转发的IP新地址，支持IPv4或IPv6格式地址。
fields.explainEn: New trap forwarding address, which can be an IPv4 or IPv6 address.
Health status of the power supply.
Running status of the power supply.
Production date of the power supply.
Serial number of the power supply.
Maximum IO response time of the LUN.
Average IO response time of the LUN.
Average read IO response time of the LUN.
Average write IO response time of the LUN.

fields.explainZh: Lun在1秒内最大读写数据量。
Lun在1秒内网络传输的最大数据量。
fields.explainEn: Maximum transmitted data volume within one second on the LUN.
Read data volume within one second on the LUN.
IO hit rate of the LUN.

fields.explainZh: Lun在1秒内网络传输的下行数据量。
fields.explainEn: Downlink data volume within one second on the LUN.

fields.explainZh: Lun在1秒内网络传输的数据量。
fields.explainEn: Transmitted data volume within one second on the LUN.

fields.explainZh: Lun在1秒内网络传输的上行数据量。
fields.explainEn: Uplink data volume within one second on the LUN.
Write data volume within one second on the LUN.
IO response time of the node.

fields.explainZh: 节点的平均读IO响应时间。
fields.explainEn: Average read IO response time of the node.

fields.explainZh: 节点的平均写IO响应时间。
fields.explainEn: Average write IO response time of the node.
Maximum IO response time of the node.

fields.explainZh: 节点在1秒内的读取数据量。
节点在1秒内网络传输的下行数据量。
fields.explainEn: Downlink data volume within one second on the node.

fields.explainZh: 节点在1秒内的读写数据量。
节点在1秒内网络传输的数据量。
fields.explainEn: Transmitted data volume within one second on the node.

fields.explainZh: 节点在1秒内的写入数据量。
节点在1秒内网络传输的上行数据量。
fields.explainEn: Uplink data volume within one second on the node.
Average IO delay of the port.
Average IO response time of the port.
Maximum IO response time of the port.

fields.explainZh: 端口的平均读IO响应时间。
fields.explainEn: Average read IO response time of the port.

fields.explainZh: 端口的平均写IO响应时间。
fields.explainEn: Average write IO response time of the port.

fields.explainZh: 端口在1秒内的最大读写数据量。
端口在1秒内网络传输的最大数据量。
fields.explainEn: Maximum transmitted data volume within one second on the port.

fields.explainZh: 端口在1秒内的读取数据量。
端口在1秒内网络传输的下行数据量。
fields.explainEn: Downlink data volume within one second on the port.

fields.explainZh: 端口在1秒内的读写数据量。
端口在1秒内网络传输的数据量。
fields.explainEn: Transmitted data volume within one second on the port.

fields.explainZh: 端口在1秒内的写入数据量。
端口在1秒内网络传输的上行数据量。
fields.explainEn: Uplink data volume within one second on the port.

fields.explainZh: Cache中存储脏数据的最高限制值。
fields.explainEn: High water level for storing dirty data in the cache.

fields.explainZh: Cache中存储脏数据的最低限制值。
fields.explainEn: Low water level for storing dirty data in the cache.
Whether the controller is the master.

fields.explainZh: 主机端口的IP地址，返回“--”表示无效。
fields.explainEn: IP address of the host port. Two hyphens (--) means an invalid value.
Physical type of the host port.
Index of the board where the ISCSI port resides.
Logic type of the ISCSI port.

fields.explainZh: ISCSI端口的IP地址的子网掩码。
fields.explainEn: Subnet mask of the IP address.

fields.explainZh: ISCSI端口的IP地址，返回“--”表示无效。
fields.explainEn: IP address of the ISCSI port. Two hyphens (--) means an invalid value.
ID of the controller node that owns the LUN.
ID of the storage pool to which the LUN belongs.

fields.explainZh: LUN的预取值，当LUN缓存预取策略为：1、固定预取，单位为：KB；2、可变预取，单位为：倍；3、不预取或智能预取，返回4294967295表示无效值。
fields.explainEn: Prefetch value of the LUN. The unit is KB for the fixed prefetch strategy, and times for the variable prefetch strategy. A value of 4294967295 returned for the no prefetch or intelligent prefetch strategy indicates an invalid value.
Operating rate of the SAS port.
Index of the board where the SAS port resides.

fields.explainZh: SAS主机端口速率，单位：1000Mbps，值为-1时表示无效。
fields.explainEn: Configured rate of the SAS port in 1000 Mbps. The value -1 means invalid rate.
Logic type of the SAS port.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
